title: Police Space Chase
description: Get chased by the police for committing crimes! Reset your heat level by escaping. No resource pack
body:
# Police Space Chase
This datapack adds police chase!

## How to become wanted
If you commit a crime (killing a villager or a player), you'll become wanted!

### Police Chase mechanics
If you encounter a police spaceship nearby, it'll start chasing you. If you manage to get far away, you'll escape, but if you get busted, you'll lose all your minerals!

Currently, the police spaceships needs to be spawned manually on your map with /function police:spaceships/police

## Dependencies
This datapack requires [MC-26 GX](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mc-26-gx) for spaceship driving.
